# Vision Managers

> AI for High-Trust Businesses

Vision Managers builds and deploys Voice AI concierge systems for healthcare practices, offers hands-on AI training for individuals and teams, and helps businesses discover where AI and automation create the most value.

## Services

- **Voice AI Concierge** (Primary): 24/7 AI-powered phone reception for healthcare practices. Answers every call, books appointments, handles patient FAQs, and escalates to staff. HIPAA-conscious, natural-sounding, live in 10–14 days. Flat monthly fee, no per-call charges.
- **AI Training**: Practical, hands-on AI training that takes people from zero to AI-native in 3 hours. 1-on-1, group workshops, or corporate training. Guaranteed outcomes.
- **Free Discovery Call**: 20-minute call to map your workflows, identify where AI saves time and money, and get a clear next step. No commitment.

## Industries Served

- Dental practices
- Optometry practices
- Chiropractic offices
- Med spas and dermatology
- Other healthcare practices
- Individuals and teams seeking AI training

## Proven Results

- Seattle-area optometry practice: 5 new patient appointments booked in week one, $4,300+ in scheduled visit value

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://visionmanagers.com/): Overview of Voice AI, training, and discovery services
- [AI Voice](https://visionmanagers.com/ai-voice): Voice AI concierge product details
- [Solutions](https://visionmanagers.com/solutions): Engagement model (Audit → Pilot → Deploy → Maintain)
- [About](https://visionmanagers.com/about): Company background and founder
- [The Lab](https://visionmanagers.com/lab): ROI calculator and AI guardrails
- [Insights](https://visionmanagers.com/insights): Thought leadership and executive briefings
- [Contact](https://visionmanagers.com/contact): Book a discovery call or send a message
